overview: Goblin Axeman is a Normal-class Humanoid/Beast monster found in Goblin Cave. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 14 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack1 at 150% ratio (210 base damage). Sight range 800, combat radius 130. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Attack2 3.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Attack1 (150%), Attack2 1 (130%), Attack2 2 (130%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Attack2 3
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Attack2 3. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 800 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 800 units, loses target at 1500 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 130, ability check distance 200
strategies.description: Combat area radius 130. Ability check distance 200. Ability attack delay: 0.5s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 800 units. Loses target at 1500 units.
